title: The Anomaly
description: A strange anomaly in the files of minecraft has come to life, hide from it. (Horror) (Red's Anomaly on curseforge)
body: The anomaly is a steve like abnormal creature that has slipped into your minecraft world, run from it. (inspired by the creepypasta series of "debase") YOU NEED GECKOLIB'S MOD FOR THIS MOD TO WORK! if you want to donate me on ko-fi: Minecraft Mod Trailer: P.S.  I would really love if you made videos about my mod, it helps a lot, even 50-100 views will help me A LOT, thanks. Modpack link: [Red's Anomaly Complete - Minecraft Modpacks - CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/reds-anomaly-complete) ![The anomaly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c111b466fb251ae2339dab517568da5cccc5f7a2.png)
